calendar.matters:
Petition By Trustee Including Points & Authorities In Support Of Petition To Confirm Assets As Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Advanced From Feb-19-25 To Jan-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition By Trustee Including Points & Authorities In Support Of Petition To Confirm Assets As Trust
Off Calendar Jan-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Garry Cohen, Esq., for and with James Phillips, Petitioner.
Doris Branner, in court, in propria persona, Interested Party.
Donald Phillips, in court, in propria persona, Interested Party.

At the court's query, Mr. Cohen offers an update regarding the capacity of Donald Phillips to waive notice advising that he believes that he does and, that it is his understanding that Mr. Phillips has no children. Ms. Banner The court advises that it is satisfied with the information provided by counsel. The court turns to the issue of capacity. Ms. Banner reports that she is Donald Phillips' primary caregiver and doesn't believe he understands the proceedings. The court believes that even though that might be the case, the court intends to grant the petition as it benefits the Trust. No objections to the court's intention are presented and the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
